post.desc:
I'd like to think that Byakuren's scroll is so magically advanced that it can even connect to Sumireko's phone – and she sends a ***Good Morning*** image to her ~~WhatsA-~~ LINE every dawn.

Huh. It seems early on the name of the scroll was considered ***Air Scroll*** based on [**one of her spell cards.**](https://en.touhouwiki.net/wiki/Undefined_Fantastic_Object/Spell_Cards/Stage_6#:~:text=エア巻物) It was the [***Symposium***](https://en.touhouwiki.net/wiki/Symposium_of_Post-mysticism/Byakuren_Hijiri#:~:text=魔人経巻) that gave the official name: *Majin Kyōkan* – ***Sorcerer's Sutra** Scroll,* and personally I'd omit the *"Scroll"* part since it should be easily implied that the sutra is, well, a scroll 🤨 And fits the two-word length of the phrase too.

And in case you don't know – guy to the left is Miroku from *InuYasha,* and guy to the right is Getō from *Jujutsu Kaisen.*
